name: sistema-gestion-talento-root
description: Ecosistema Digital Talent Management - DISCOL SAS

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.start: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
